titleStmt.title: SII 28.74: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 74. (A.R. No. 72 of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Vātāpi-Gaṇapati shrine, east, north and west walls.

This much damaged record tells about the arrangement made to lay an one-winged (with a row of houses on one side only) path-street (tiruvīdi) to form the third prākāra (aisle) (of the temple ?) and another street two-winged (i.e. with rows of houses on both sides) to be called Irājākkaḷtambirān. It gives elaborate details of the land (probably) dēvadāṉa-iṟaiili (tax-free land of maṭham) or tax-free land attached to the kitchen of the temple (maḍa-ppuṟam) which was taken over for devising the street mentioned. Also refers to the kāṇikkaḍan as fixed in the 11th and 41st years of śuṅgaṅ-tavirttaruḷina Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-dēvar (I) and also to paḻavarai (old tax ?) which were apparently exempted in respect of the land utilised for laying out the streets. It also refers to several settlements which were separated from main villages. There is mention of land given in exchange (parivarttaṉai) (but the details of the land involved have not been given). Apparently exemption from taxes on the land involved was pursuant to a royal order as several officials are seen to have attested the record. At the end, there is mention of an uḷvari (a procedural document issued pursuant to a royal order) for making some land devadāṉa-iṟai-ili but the details are not available as the record is incomplete. Posible this has reference to the land given in exchange to the temple and maṭham in lieu of the land taken over for laying the street.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuva
cakkaravartti
kaḷ maturai
yum Īḻamuṅ
karuvūrum pāṇṭi
yaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ
koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulo
ttuṅka coḻatevarkku
yāṇṭu 2 10 2 10000 3 1000ṉāl
keyamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭu maru
kalnāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅ
kuṭi Uṭaiyār koyil muṉṟām pirā
kāram vaṭakkiṭṭup pottu I
tiṉ vaṭakkil Orucciṟakaṉ tiruvī
tiuṭ muṉṟām pirākāramā ka
vum Itaṉ vaṭakku Oruc ciṟakaṉ
tiruvitiyākavum Irācākkaḷ
tampirāṉeṉṉun tirunāma
ttāl Irucciṟakaṉ tiruvītiyuñ
ceyyat tiruvāy moḻin
taruḷi nīṅ
kalāka nīkkiṉapaṭikkum Uḷvari
tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyum maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili ṭarūpāy- 2 10
niccayitta nilattāl rūpāy 6 100 8 10 rūpāy ttāl � poṉ � mūṉṟumā rūpāy
Ivvūroṭum Ivvūrkaṇapatīśvaramu kaṉa tiruviti 2
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nilattāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ poṉ ṉāl pon_ 2 100 yiṭṭa
lattāl muṉpu niccayitta poṉ mukkāl poṉ ṭaiyār cuṅka
tevarkku [10 1kku] Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ
Uttarāpatināyakar � kiḻ pūja ko ḷum Uttarāpati nā tāṉam Ivvūrppiṟi karanallūrilum kaṇaContinuation piece missing.
muṭaiyār tirunāma nilattu Akappaṭṭa nilattukkum Ikkoyil tirumuttiśvara yār tirunāmattukkāṇi
yāṉa nilattu ṇṇapurattu Ivvūrp piṟinta civapāta maṅkalattu kaṇapatiśva rivar taṉai paṇ
nilattukku ko ttoṇṭappi Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi nilamāy muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻampiya
yarum tevatāṉa I tuk kūṭukiṟa nilam tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟapaṭiyum tavi yāṇṭu 2 10varuṣam mu
kūṭṭiṉa kaṇapatiśva ciṟuttoṇṭa nallūril tarampeṟṟa nilam � ¿ ṉāl nila Opāti paḻaviṟai poṉ mūn_ṛumā 100 �
paḻaviṟai nilattāl pon_ mūn_ṛumā � 100ta � ṉāl 10 6 Ākki pon_ � 2 100 5 10 5 10 mūn_ṛumā niccayitta Opāti poṉ mūṉṟumā �
rkaṭamaiyum An ṟai kaṭṭākki koṇṭa nilattu Opāti pon_ 100 � paḻaviṟai kaṭṭākki koṇṭa Opāti 100 2 10 �
100 6 10 � rūpāy � brahma m tirunīṟṟuccoḻanallūr Eṉṟu Iṟukkiṟa nilattu tarampeṟṟa » mukkāl � Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku
Aḷakka kuṟainta nilattu Opa ṉāl nilaopāti paḻaviṟai poṉ �10 � 7poṉ niccayitta Opāti poṉ ndha vuḷa � Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavittaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku
10 1 Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ Ākki poṉ 5 1000 7 100 � vapātacekaranallūr Eṉṟu Iṟukka nilattu tiṟappil tarampeṟṟa rūpāy (1/4)mā Aḷakka kuṟainta nilattu Opāti rūpāy 4
¬ mukkālm 1 mun=tiri Āna ¬ (1/4)mā ¬ mukkāl niccayitta Opāti poṉ 10 �1000 Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ Opāti poṉ�10 3ṉāl 10 6 Ākki poṉ � 100 pon_ 3 10 1 Ivvūril Ikkoyil

Ut ti nāyakar tevatāṉa I I mukkāl� 10 6varuṣam Aḷakka lattu Opāti ¬(1/4)� ¬ � ¿ 1 muntiri ¬ (1/4) � ṉāl nilaopāti paḻaviṟai poṉ � ta � ta niccayitta
pon_ � 100 � 1muntiri 100 � 1muntiriṉāl 10 6 � kū mukkāl Ivvūrp piṟinta civapātacekara nallūril Uttarapati nāyakar tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattut tarampeṟṟaṭu
Aḷakkak kuṟainta nilat mukkāl � 1kāṇi � 1muntiri ¬ 1 muntiri � mukkāl niccayitta Opāti poṉ � 1 muntiri mukkāl Ø� Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ Opāti poṉ � ṉāl 10 6 Ākki poṉ rūpāy 1000 10�6 �
kiḻ pūjai koṇṭaruḷum Utta yāṉa nilattu taram peṟṟaṭu nta Þ10 6� Aḷak nilatta Orumā m� mukkāl mūn_ṛumā 1kāṇi Ānaṭu � ṉāl nilaopāti paḻaviṟai poṉ� 6 Iṟaikaṭ
Opāti poṉ � ṉāl cintāmaṇiccaruppetimaṅkalat [ tiśvara] muṭaiyār Ūrkkiḻ Iṟai(iṟai)yiliyāṉa nilattut tarampeṟṟa ¬ (1/4) 10 6 Aḷakkak kuṟainta nilattu Opāti rūpāy � ¬ 1muntiri ¬ 5 � ṉāl nilaopāti
paḻaviṟai poṉ 10 � 100 10 3 �Ø niccayitta Opāti kantavittaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa teva Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ Opāti poṉ � poṉ 1 mun=tiriṉāl 10 6 Ākki poṉ Iraṇṭumā mūṉṟumā � ṉāl � 6 � paḻaviṟai
Ilāta nilattāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ 16 pon_ 1mun=tiri 1araikkāl niccayitta poṉ �ka 5 100 �2 ṭaiyār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku 4 100� niccayitta nilattāl poṉ6 100�10 �3 10 2 mukkālniccayittilāta nilattu
Ittevarkku 10¬5 Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa cayitta 10 6 Ākaki poṉ 6 100 10 2 100� nicca lāta nilattāl muṉpu niccayitta poṉ � mukkāl Āna poṉ � 2 10¬ 7pon_ 1muntiriØ Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku
16� Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ 10 6āk � Uṭaiyār kulottu varkku 10� Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa nilattāl poṉ Iraṇṭumā � 100 � mukkāl Iṟaikaṭṭāta nilattu � tāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattāl paḻaviṟai
poṉ � tiṟappu ni kkumuṉ � poṉ vu 100� 1000 � Itaṉu ṭaiyār koyil muṉṟām pirakāram po Itaṉ vaṭakkil Orucciṟakaṉ tiruviti ṭpa muṉṟām pirakārāmākavum Itaṉ vaṭa
Orucciṟakaṉ tiruvitiyākavum Irācākkaḷ Irucciṟakaṉākac ceykiṟa tiruvitiyuñ ce Iṭaṅkaḷil luṅkuḷamuṅ karaiyumākak veṇṭum nilattukkuk koyil kaṇakkuc ciṟuttoṇṭappiriyaṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi 6 �
kūṭiṉa nilam nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattuk toṇṭatevar tirumāḷikaiyil Eḻu kkum Uttirāpatiṉāyakarkkum tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattu kaṇavatiśvaramuṭaiyār tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāṉa nilattum Ivvūril palaruṭaṉum parivarttaṉai
paṇṇiṉa nilamum ciṟuttoṇṭa nal tirukkaṇṇapurattu niṉṟun tiruniṟṟuc nṟuñ civapātacekara nallūrreṉṟum Iṟuk lattu niṉṟum Ivvūrp piṟinta civapātacekaranal niṉṟum tiṉacintāmaṇiccaruppetimaṅkalattu
It seems that some portions are between line 53 and 54 are lost. ttuṅkacoḻa This portion in lines 54 and 55 must have been inscribed on an abuttin stone between the stone continuing lines 54 to 87. ṭṭiṉa nilattāl poṉ Continuation piece lost.
niccayitta poṉ[100]¬ This portion in lines 54 and 55 must have been inscribed on an abuttin stone between the stone continuing lines 54 to 87. 6 100 � 7 pon_ mukkāl Āna Continuation piece lost.
mukkāl � nikki � Continuation piece lost.
100 1 � niccayitta poṉ � Continuation piece lost.
ntavittaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkaco Continuation piece lost.
nta nilattāl poṉ¬¿ �100 ta ¿ Continuation piece lost.
muṉpu niccayi � Continuation piece lost.
Uṭaiyār kulottuṅkacoḻa tevarkku varuṣam Continuation piece lost.
�[100 7 pon_] mukkāl Iṟaikaṭṭāta nilattāl ṟai Continuation piece lost.
pon_�2 100�7 10 100 3mukkāl mukkāl Itil kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyār tevartāṉam ¿
poṉ vu100 mukkāl Ikkoyilil vikkirama coḷiśvaramuṭaiyār tevartāṉa mūṉṟumā
ttoṇṭa tirumāḷikaiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum Uttarāpati nāyakar teva kha ṉāl cīṟu
ttoṇṭa tirumāḷikaiyil maṭattukku maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili poṉ�laṉā Ivaipuravu ttu
mukaveṭṭi ntaiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattumuka� taṇai nallūruṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattumukaveṭṭi perumaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattumukaveṭṭi Uḻu
ntaiyuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam
neṟkuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam
pantaṇai nallūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kocalattarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cerakoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai vaḷavakoṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavatarayaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai m peṟṟarayaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai veṇāṭṭarayaṉ Eḻut ṉakarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vicaiyarā tu Ivai vaṉaṉāṭuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai paḻantiyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ṇā rayaṉ
Eḻuttu .... 4 1000 pon_ �ṉāl tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku Uḷvarippaṭi keyamāṇi
kka vaḷanāṭṭu marukalnāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭik kaṇapatiśvaramuṭaiyārkku veṇṭum nivanta
ṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka Ikkoyilil muṉṟām pirakāram vaṭakkiṭṭup perttu Itaṉ vaṭakku Orucciṟakaṉ tiruvi
ti Uṭpaṭa muṉṟām pirakāramākavum Itaṉ vaṭakku Orucciṟakaṉ tiruvitiyākavum Irājākkattampirāṉeṉ
ṉum tirunāmattāl Irucciṟakaṉāka ca
niṉṟuṅ kūṭiṉa nilamumāy Iṟai kaṭṭuk kuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭiyun tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattu Akappaṭṭa nilam tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy varukiṟapaṭiyun tavirttu yāṇṭu 2 10� mutal niṅkalāka nikkiṉa mutal kūṭiṉa nilam nikki nikki niṉṟa nilattuk kaṇavatiśvaramuṭaiyār tevatā The continuation stone is missing.
yāṉa nilattut taram peṟṟa ¬ 5kāṇiṉāl nilaopāti paḻaviṟai poṉ �6 6 pon_ niccayitta Opāti pon_ 2 10� �ñ Uṭaiyār cuṅkantavirttaruḷiṉa kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku 4 10 1� niccayitta Opāti pon_ [2 10]00� Uṭaiyār kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku 10�
Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa Opāti pon_ �100 1muntiri� ciṟuttoṇṭa tevar tirumāḷikaiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkum Uṭaiyār Uttarāpati nāyakar tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattu tarampeṟṟa rūpāy ¬ �m l Opāti paḻaviṟai poṉ 4 1000 5 100 6 10 �6�ñ niccayitta Opāti poṉ . 100�mukkāl mukkāl
6 10 1rūpāy niccayitta Opāti poṉ � 6 100 1� Uṭaiyār kulottuṅka coḻa tevarkku 10varuṣam Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa Opāti poṉ ¬ 7 10 7 � ciṟuttoṇṭanallūr niṉ(ṉ)ṟum kūṭi ¬ 2 ¬ Ü nma 1mun=tiriṉāl kūṭiya paḻaviṟai pon_ 4 10 � paḻaviṟai Ilāta nilattāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ 10 6 Ākki poṉ � 100 � 1muntiriThe continuation stone is missing.
Āna poṉ � 5 10 2 � ¿ niccayitta poṉ 10 nta brahmateyam tirukkaṇṇapurattu niṉṟum tiruniṟṟuccoḻa nallūreṉṟu Iṟukkiṟa nilattukkūṭiṉa ¬ mukkāl�¬saṉāl kūṭiṉa paḻaviṟai poṉ � 100 [1�7] pon_ nic
10 1� Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa kāṇikkaṭaṉ poṉ 100� kki pon_ ¬1000 7 100 ki � ta � civapātacekaranallūreṉṟu Iṟukkiṟa nilattu niṉṟuṅkūṭiṉa ¬�khakū1kāṇi �ṉāl kūṭṭiṉa paḻaviṟai pon_ ¬ 1000 7 100m � niccayitta poṉ¬ 10
�10 �100 1 � Uṭaiyār cuṅkan ttuṅkacoḻatevarkku
1 mūn_ṛumā 6 pon_ � mukkāl 10 � Iṟai �Continuation lost
